codeReview.summary: The feature ships substantial backend/frontend analytics functionality and test coverage, but the team breakdown implementation has blocking semantic errors against the contract and one additional date-range correctness gap.

issues.description: VAL-ANALYTICS-008 requires "Intros Approved (as connector)", but getTeamActivity increments introsApproved by intro.requester, not intro.connector. This misattributes approvals to requesters and produces incorrect per-user team metrics.
searchesPerformed is set to the same global saved-search total for every user row (totalSearches), so the team table is not a true per-user breakdown for that metric as required by VAL-ANALYTICS-008.

getRelationshipHealth only filters by createdAt <= endDate and ignores range.startDate, so historical relationships before the selected window are still included; this weakens date-range filtering consistency for the relationship-health chart.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The implementation-worker skill content appears out of sync with this Relay mission context.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission AGENTS.md line 5 requires work in /Users/andy/Documents/GitHub/relay on ports 3100/3101, while .factory/skills/implementation-worker/SKILL.md lines 10, 18, 32-41, 51, and 65 instruct org-planner paths, packages/server|packages/client, and port 5173.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Relay shared library docs are missing architecture guidance referenced by worker procedure.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: LS of /Users/andy/Documents/GitHub/relay/.factory/library shows only user-testing.md; there is no architecture.md even though worker procedure requires architecture review.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Analytics query handling bypasses the stated Zod query-validation convention.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AGENTS.md line 30 says routes should use Zod validation for request body/params/query, but packages/api/src/routes/analytics.ts lines 10-23 register handlers directly without validate middleware for query params.

summary: Reviewed analytics-dashboard commit 18f8208c325d64da204eee45166b46f75206fd8f and found blocking team-breakdown correctness issues: introsApproved is attributed to requesters instead of connectors, and searchesPerformed is duplicated from a global total for every user row. Relationship-health date filtering also ignores startDate. Marking this review as fail.
